templates.title: Simple Progress Bar (ASCII)
templates.description: Progress bar ASCII tanpa dependency eksternal. Support percentage, ETA, dan custom bar characters.
templates.code:
class {{nama_class}}:
    """ASCII progress bar with percentage and optional ETA."""
    def __init__(self, total, width={{bar_width}}, fill='{{fill_char}}', empty='{{empty_char}}', prefix='', suffix=''):
        self.total = total
        self.width = width
        self.fill = fill
        self.empty = empty
        self.prefix = prefix
        self.suffix = suffix
        self.current = 0
        self._start_time = None

    def update(self, amount=1):
        """Advance progress bar by amount."""
        if self._start_time is None:
            self._start_time = time.time()
        self.current = min(self.current + amount, self.total)
        self._draw()

    def _draw(self):
        pct = self.current / self.total if self.total else 1
        filled = int(self.width * pct)
        bar = self.fill * filled + self.empty * (self.width - filled)
        pct_str = '%.1f%%' % (pct * 100)
        eta_str = ''
        if self._start_time and self.current > 0:
            elapsed = time.time() - self._start_time
            rate = self.current / elapsed
            remaining = (self.total - self.current) / rate if rate > 0 else 0
            if remaining > 1:
                eta_str = ' ETA: %ds' % int(remaining)
        line = '\r%s |%s| %s %s/%s%s' % (self.prefix, bar, pct_str, self.current, self.total, eta_str)
        if self.suffix:
            line += ' ' + self.suffix
        sys.stderr.write(line)
        if self.current >= self.total:
            sys.stderr.write('\n')
        sys.stderr.flush()

    def __enter__(self):
        self._start_time = time.time()
        return self

    def __exit__(self, *exc):
        if self.current < self.total:
            sys.stderr.write('\n')

templates.title: Spinner Context Manager
templates.description: Spinner animasi di terminal. Context manager atau manual start/stop. stdlib only.

templates.title: ASCII Table Printer
templates.description: Print list of dict sebagai tabel ASCII yang rapi. Auto-width columns.

templates.title: ANSI Color Text Helper
templates.description: Print teks berwarna di terminal menggunakan ANSI escape codes. stdlib only.

templates.title: Yes/No Confirm Dialog
templates.description: Prompt user Y/n dengan default. Return True/False. Cross-platform.

templates.title: Multi-Select Checklist
templates.description: User pilih beberapa item dari list menggunakan keyboard. stdlib only.

templates.title: Password Input (Masked)
templates.description: Input password dengan karakter tersembunyi. Support confirm/retype mode. stdlib getpass.

templates.title: Clear Terminal Screen (Cross-Platform)
templates.description: Bersihkan layar terminal. Support Windows (cls) dan Unix/Linux/macOS (clear).
